complete-missions.title: Complete Missions
complete-missions.description: Discover top brands and complete fun tasks to get started on your journey.

earn-tokens.title: Earn Tokens
earn-tokens.description: Collect tokens for every mission and grow your balance effortlessly.

win-rewards.title: Win Rewards
win-rewards.description: Use your tokens to join lotteries and unlock exclusive rewards from top partners.

emailScreen.title: Enter your email
emailScreen.subtitle: We'll send you a code to sign in or create an account. Tokens and lotteries come next.
emailScreen.label: EMAIL ADDRESS

dev.title: Development mode
dev.subtitle: Password sign-in using the email above (e.g. seed accounts). Omitted from release builds.

errors.MISSION_TOTAL_LIMIT_REACHED: The total submission limit for this mission has been reached.
errors.INVALID_SERVER_RESPONSE: Invalid server response. Please try again.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.generic: Could not buy a ticket. Please try again.
